inputs.name: tree_mask
inputs.meaning: Boolean mask representing the tree structure of draft tokens where tree_mask[i][j] indicates if token j is a child of token i in the speculative decoding tree
inputs.inference_role: Defines the hierarchical relationship between draft tokens during speculative decoding

inputs.name: verified_seq_len
inputs.meaning: Length of the verified sequence for each batch, indicating how many tokens have been confirmed correct so far
inputs.inference_role: Provides the base position offset for calculating absolute token positions in the sequence

inputs.name: positions
inputs.meaning: Output tensor that will store the absolute positions of tokens in the sequence
inputs.inference_role: Used to map draft tokens to their actual sequence positions during inference

outputs.name: retrive_index
outputs.meaning: Index mapping that maps each draft token to its original position in the flattened batch-draft dimension
outputs.inference_role: Maintains correspondence between draft tokens and their original indices for tracking purposes

outputs.name: retrive_next_token
outputs.meaning: For each draft token, stores the index of the next token in the same branch of the tree (or -1 if none)
outputs.inference_role: Enables traversal along the same branch of the speculative tree during inference

outputs.name: retrive_next_sibling
outputs.meaning: For each draft token, stores the index of its next sibling in the tree structure (or -1 if no sibling exists)
outputs.inference_role: Enables traversal across siblings in the speculative tree, supporting parallel verification of alternative branches
